Comparing TestBrand vs CompetitorA:

| Dimension       | TestBrand                | CompetitorA              |
|-----------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| Pricing         | Transparent, lean        | Tiered, enterprise-heavy |
| Open source     | Yes (MIT)                | Partial                  |
| Integrations    | Growing                  | Mature, broad ecosystem  |
| Support         | Community + docs         | SLA-backed support       |

Most reviewers on g2.com and reddit.com/r/saas suggest matching choice to team scale.
